title: We Live Here (EADF2026)
synopsis:
Set in the desolate Kazakh steppe, a former Soviet nuclear test site where 456 blasts left a tragic radioactive legacy, the documentary offers a stark warning for humanity's future. While ecologists map uninhabitable zones, a local family seeks proof that their daughter’s illness stems from radiation to secure medical treatment. Torn between love for her homeland and a looming sense of danger, her personal struggle echoes fragmented family tragedies, begging the question: how do we move on when the past’s poison continues to claim the next generation?

 

Nominated for Best Documentary Film, Asia Pacific Screen Awards
CPH:DOX
DOK.fest München

While ecologists map uninhabitable zones, a local family seeks proof that their daughter’s illness stems from radiation to secure medical treatment. Nominated for Best Documentary Film, Asia Pacific Screen Awards
CPH:DOX
DOK.fest München
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
在哈薩克草原，前蘇聯456次核試留下的世紀創傷依然刺骨。昔日第一枚核彈引爆時，有小孩聽着震撼巨響興奮起舞，全然不知無形遺毒即將蠶食土地。當年的小孩如今已成祖父，其子正竭力尋找官方輻射證明，以爭取醫療支援來拯救惡疾纏身的女兒，生病的女孩則在對故土的熱愛與恐懼中拉扯。另一邊廂，身穿白色保護衣的科學家在仿如末日荒原的禁區中測量。核爆殘影與跨世代的家庭傷痛互相交纏，面對無形蔓延的陰霾，留下來的人該如何自處？

 

亞太電影大獎 最佳紀錄片提名
哥本哈根國際紀錄片電影節
慕尼黑國際紀錄片電影節
